zh.Hollingbourne, Kent, England: 英國英格蘭肯特霍林波恩
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Nicholas de Criol III於1282年12月29日出生在英國英格蘭肯特薩時，他的父親Nicholas de Criol II22歲，母親Margaret Peache32歲。他於大約1304年與Rosia De Criol在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1329年7月18日之前在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.Hollingbourne, Kent, England: 英国英格兰肯特霍林波恩
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Nicholas de Criol III于1282年12月29日出生在英国英格兰肯特薩时，他的父亲Nicholas de Criol II22岁，母亲Margaret Peache32岁。他于大约1304年与Rosia De Criol在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1329年7月18日之前在英国英格兰。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Criol
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Alberto, Hipolito, Luis, Eriberto, Jose, Luisa, Ramon, Ricardo.  French/Haitian Edwige, Fritz, Serge, Yvrose.
Catalan: from the old personal name Oriol, from Latin Aureolus.

Catalan and French: nickname, possibly for a flamboyant dresser or sweet singer, from Catalan and Old French oriol ‘oriole’ (from Latin aureolus ‘golden’), a species of bird of which the male has bright yellow and black plumage. As a surname of French origin it is also common in Haiti.

variants.name: Oriel
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Middle English and Old French female personal name Oriold, Oriel, from ancient Germanic Aurildis, Orieldis, composed of elements meaning ‘fire’ + ‘strife’.
French (Vosges): nickname from Old French oriel, a variant of oriol ‘oriole’ (see Oriol ).

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Nicholas de Criol III was born on 29 December 1282, in Sarre, Kent, England, United Kingdom, his father, Nicholas de Criol II, was 22 and his mother, Margaret Peache, was 32. He married Rosia De Criol about 1304, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died before 18 July 1329, in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Nicholas de Criol III est né le 29 décembre 1282, à Sarre, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Nicholas de Criol II, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Margaret Peache, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Rosia De Criol environ 1304, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé avant 18 juillet 1329, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Nicholas de Criol III am 29. Dezember 1282 in Sarre, Kent, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nicholas de Criol II 22 und seine Mutter Margaret Peache 32. Er hat um 1304 in England, United Kingdom Rosia De Criol geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb vor 18. Juli 1329 in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Nicholas de Criol III è nato il il 29 dicembre 1282 nel Sarre, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Nicholas de Criol II, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Peache, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Rosia De Criol circa 1304, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì prima del 18 luglio 1329, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas de Criol IIIが1282年12月29日にイギリスイギリスケントサアで生まれた時，父Nicholas de Criol IIは22歳，母Margaret Peacheは32歳であった。約1304年にイギリスイギリスでRosia De Criolと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1329年7月18日以前にイギリスイギリスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas de Criol III(이)가 1282년 12월 29일 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 사르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicholas de Criol II(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Peache(은)는 32세였다. 그는 대략 1304년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Rosia De Criol(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1329년 7월 18일 이전 영국 잉글랜드에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Nicholas de Criol III nasceu em 29 de dezembro de 1282, em Sarre, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Nicholas de Criol II, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Peache, tinha 32 anos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Nicholas de Criol III родился 29 декабря 1282 г. в местности сарр, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Nicholas de Criol II было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Peache, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Rosia De Criol около 1304 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер перед 18 июля 1329 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания.
